caption: A man with a white beard and glasses, dressed in a light-colored long-sleeved shirt under a cream-colored sleeveless vest, stands behind a dark brown podium. He is positioned in front of a textured green wall with a geometric pattern and a vertical glass display case containing thin branches and small red flowers. Two black microphones are mounted on the podium in front of him. Across the sequence, the man speaks and gestures with his hands. Initially, he looks forward with his hands resting near the podium. He then shifts his gaze slightly and gestures with his left hand. Later, he looks toward the audience while gesturing with his right hand, and finally, he extends his right arm outward away from his body as he continues to speak. The background and setting remain static throughout the clip.
